decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Studio read (auth session, monitor curl blank 0/13): suppression lifted vs 06-13. Tunguska long 0->107v (>100v threshold). Shorts: briggs 319, v2_twist 299, v1_twist 281, v3_answer 112 (was 106), v1_answer 87, v1_hook 64, v2_answer 34, v3_twist 28, v2_hook 7, v3_hook 3. No asset >1000v yet. Backfilled real snapshot to stats_log.csv.
v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was stale SCHEDULED (06-15) in state but verified PUBLIC at 319v via Studio + oEmbed 200. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z.

CORRECTION: cron IS firing — 30+ open pulse/daily PRs dated 06-25/06-26 exist; each branches off stale main (frozen 06-13) and re-discovers the same drift, so agent-log/state look unchanged. Real issue: unmerged routine-branch pileup needs a merge/cleanup policy. Monitor curl still blind (port to camoufox-stealth blocking). Pipeline dry past 06-15; untracked DRAFT '9 Barrels Empty' Short in Studio; v4 Roanoke stuck on Flow thumb blocker.
